title: Performance+
description: The best performance modpack for neoforge
body:
The best perfomance modpack for neoforge with some quality of life features and built with mobile devices (laptops, tablets, and phones) in mind.
                                          
                                          Tested hardware:
           Laptop with: 16gb ram, AMD ryzen 5600h, Nvidia RTX3050 ti 4gb 80tdp, 256 gb ssd
                Laptop with: 16gb ram, Intel i5-12450H, Nvidia GTX1650 4gb, 500gb ssd.
                        Desktop with: 32gb ram, AMD ryzen 7, Nvidia RTX3060 ti
                            Desktop with: X ram, Intel N/A, Nvidia RTX3050
   the desktops saw nearly 3K~ fps in less intesnse areas and 300~ in worstcase scenarios like                 
                    server hubs, large events, and extremely demanding shaders.
